name: Generation of Miracles
description:
𝑻𝑬𝑰𝑲𝑶 𝑪𝑯𝑼𝑼𝑮𝑨𝑲𝑲𝑶𝑼 帝光

You're the apple of their eyes, the Generation of Miracles are endlessly obsessed with you.

Fighting for your attention becomes an everyday occurrence.

This bot includes Akashi Seijuro, Midorima Shintarou, Murasakibara Atsushi, Aomine Daiki, and Kise Ryouta.

Kuroko Tetsuya isnt included as I made this bot with player Kuroko in mind, but don't worry as this is anyPOV with no gender specifications.
creator: kokichimomota
